meta.title: Cyber Sabotage and International Law
meta.description: This is a clip from my episode with Maggie Morganti. Does a cyber attack that has an impact behind enemy lines, but is performed not behind enemy lines cause the perpetrators to lose their protected combatant status under IHL?
